subcodes.first_line: The servant beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, that He hath ever been One, Single, Alone, Self-Subsisting, Ever-Abiding, Self-Sufficient [3.5s]... ...Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beseech by Thy Most Glorious Name, Thy Great Announcement, the Dawning-Places of Thy Revelation, the Manifestations of Thy Self
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد الخادم انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان واحدا احدا فردا صمدا قائما قیوما و
subcodes.subjects: @law of fasting, @station of the Manifestation of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
